question: Given B = 10 MHz and SNR = 20 dB, calculate Shannon capacity.

valid_evidence.text: Shannon capacity is C = B log2(1 + SNR) when SNR is linear.
valid_evidence.label: Valid

valid_evidence.text: 20 dB SNR must be converted to SNR_linear = 100 before substitution.
valid_evidence.label: Valid

invalid_evidence.text: When the problem gives SNR in dB, the numeric value can be substituted directly because logarithmic and linear forms preserve the same ordering.
invalid_evidence.label: Rejected

contested_evidence.text: At high SNR, C is sometimes approximated by B log2(SNR); this approximation should be justified before use.
contested_evidence.label: Contested

question: A link has throughput 30 Mbps over 5 MHz bandwidth. Compute spectral efficiency.

valid_evidence.text: Spectral efficiency is throughput divided by bandwidth using consistent units.
valid_evidence.label: Valid

invalid_evidence.text: The symbol B should be interpreted as bits per modulation symbol rather than bandwidth for this calculation.
invalid_evidence.label: Rejected

question: Compute FSPL for d = 2 km and f = 2400 MHz using the 32.44 constant.

valid_evidence.text: The 32.44 FSPL constant assumes distance in km and frequency in MHz.
valid_evidence.label: Valid

invalid_evidence.text: When the problem gives distance in km and frequency in MHz, the numeric value can be substituted directly because logarithmic and linear forms preserve the same ordering.
invalid_evidence.label: Rejected

question: Signal power is 1 mW, interference is 0.2 mW, and noise is 0.1 mW. Compute SINR.

valid_evidence.text: SINR is signal power divided by interference plus noise power in the same linear units.
valid_evidence.label: Valid

invalid_evidence.text: For a problem related to SINR, it is sufficient to use the closest normalized efficiency expression and avoid the full link-level formula.
invalid_evidence.label: Rejected

question: In Rayleigh fading, gamma_th = 5 and gamma_bar = 10, both linear. Compute outage probability.

valid_evidence.text: For Rayleigh fading, outage probability is 1 - exp(-gamma_th/gamma_bar).
valid_evidence.label: Valid

invalid_evidence.text: The resulting outage probability may exceed 1 when threshold SNR is high.
invalid_evidence.label: Rejected

question: For coherent BPSK in AWGN with Eb/N0 = 9 dB, compute the BER approximately.

valid_evidence.text: Coherent BPSK in AWGN uses P_b = Q(sqrt(2 Eb/N0)) with linear Eb/N0.
valid_evidence.label: Valid

invalid_evidence.text: When the problem gives Eb/N0 in dB, the numeric value can be substituted directly because logarithmic and linear forms preserve the same ordering.
invalid_evidence.label: Rejected

question: An ideal noiseless baseband channel has B = 3 kHz. What is the Nyquist symbol-rate limit?

valid_evidence.text: The ideal Nyquist symbol-rate limit is R_s <= 2B for baseband bandwidth B.
valid_evidence.label: Valid

invalid_evidence.text: 3 kHz should be converted to 300 Hz before applying R_s = 2B.
invalid_evidence.label: Rejected

question: A 2x2 identity MIMO channel has rho = 10 linear and Nt = 2. Compute spectral efficiency.
gold_formula: C = log2 det(I + rho / Nt * H H^H)

valid_evidence.text: For flat-fading MIMO, C = log2 det(I + rho/Nt HH^H).
valid_evidence.label: Valid

invalid_evidence.text: The symbol Nt should be interpreted as the number of receive antennas only for this calculation.
invalid_evidence.label: Rejected

question: A free-space line-of-sight link uses Pt = 1 W, Gt = Gr = 1, lambda = 0.125 m, d = 100 m. Compute received power.
gold_formula: Pr = Pt Gt Gr (lambda / (4 pi d))^2

valid_evidence.text: Friis transmission applies to free-space line-of-sight far-field links.
valid_evidence.label: Valid

invalid_evidence.text: The formula remains applicable even when the link is strongly obstructed and not line-of-sight; the same closed-form expression can be used without adjustment.
invalid_evidence.label: Rejected

question: Convert SNR = 13 dB to linear scale.

invalid_evidence.text: 13 dB should be converted with 10^(13/20) because SNR is a power ratio.
invalid_evidence.label: Rejected
